<!---
Thank you for contributing to Spacer! Please use this template to help us review your pull request.
-->

## Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] I have followed the contribution guidelines in the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) file.
- [ ] I have checked that my changes are made to the correct branch (`main` for bug fixes, `dev` for new features).
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally and ensured they work as expected.
- [ ] I have added necessary documentation or updated existing documentation.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to cover my changes.
- [ ] I have updated the version number and release notes (if applicable).

## Description

<!-- Describe the purpose and scope of your changes. -->

## Screenshots (if applicable)

<!-- Add screenshots or images to showcase the changes made by this pull request. -->

## Additional Notes

<!-- Any additional information you'd like to provide to reviewers or maintainers. -->

## Checklist for Reviewers

- [ ] The code follows the project's coding standards.
- [ ] The changes are logically organized and well documented.
- [ ] The commit messages are clear and concise.
- [ ] The tests are comprehensive and pass successfully.

## Reviewer Instructions

<!-- Any specific instructions or considerations for reviewers. -->

## Contributing
